---
name: hello-world-web-app
description: Prompt for creating a basic hello world web app
---

Hey, I want you to create a simple "Hello, World!" web application. The app should have a single page that displays the message "Hello, World!" in a large font.

Tech stack:
* Node.js
* Express
* HTML/CSS

Requirements:
1. Set up a basic Express server that listens on port 3000.
2. Create a single route (e.g., "/") that serves an HTML page.
3. The HTML page should display "Hello, World!" prominently.
4. Include basic styling to center the text on the page.
5. Setup basic npm scripts for starting the app.

Additional notes:
- This is for a demo, im more concerned about getting something up and running quickly than following best practices.
